
// AUTO-GENERATED by camel-package-maven-plugin - DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE
= camel doc

Shows documentation for kamelet, component, and other Camel resources


== Usage

[source,bash]
----
camel doc [options]
----



== Options

[cols="2,5,1,2",options="header"]
|===
| Option | Description | Default | Type
| `--camel-version` | To use a different Camel version than the default version |  | String
| `--filter` | Filter option listed in tables by name, description, or group |  | String
| `--header` | Whether to display component message headers | false | boolean
| `--kamelets-version` | Apache Camel Kamelets version | RuntimeType.KAMELETS_VERSION | String
| `--open-url` | Opens the online documentation form the Camel website in the web browser | false | boolean
| `--runtime` | Runtime (camel-main, spring-boot, quarkus) |  | RuntimeType
| `--url` | Prints the link to the online documentation on the Camel website | false | boolean
| `-h,--help` | Display the help and sub-commands |  | boolean
|===
